result:
The git commands need user approval via the permission dialog. It appears those are being denied or the session is non-interactive. Here is what needs to be run to open the draft PR — you can run these directly:

```bash
git checkout -b claude/daily-summary-2026-06-25
git add docs/DAILY-SUMMARY-2026-06-25.md
git commit -m "report: daily activity summary 2026-06-25"
git push -u origin claude/daily-summary-2026-06-25
gh pr create \
  --title "report: daily activity summary 2026-06-25" \
  --draft \
  --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary

Auto-generated daily summary of what changed in otchealth-claude-tools in the last 24 hours (2026-06-25).

**13 fleet bulletin entries** landed today across two themes:

- **Superbrain memory program fully closed** — all waves (P0 per-prompt inject, P1 semantic tier, P2 write-through indexing, auto-medic, entity layer, blob retry, distillation durability) are live.
- **Fleet transition infrastructure** — `fleet-dispatch` live, Hyperagent engine migration directive (Matt 2026-06-25), and Sunset/Sunrise Transfer Protocol shipped fleet-wide.

**One merged PR**: #231 `bulletin: Sunset/Sunrise Transfer Protocol live fleet-wide` (490 files, squash commit).

## Report file

`docs/DAILY-SUMMARY-2026-06-25.md`

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
EOF
)"
```

**What was found:**

The repo has one local commit (a full squash at 08:35Z today, PR #231). The 24h activity lives in `FLEET-BULLETIN.md` — 13 entries from 02:59Z to 08:34Z covering:

1. **Memory/Superbrain** (10 entries): per-prompt inject, semantic tier, write-through indexing, entity layer, blob retry hardening, auto-medic fleet medic — the full program is now closed.
2. **Fleet dispatch** (05:54Z): agent-to-agent hand-off without human relay.
3. **Hyperagent transfer directive** (08:13Z): ~96h Claude Code blackout, move to Hyperagent engine.
4. **Sunset/Sunrise Protocol** (08:34Z): clean cross-engine spin-down/spin-up — the final bulletin entry, also the squash commit.

The report file is written at `docs/DAILY-SUMMARY-2026-06-25.md`. Once you approve and run the git commands above, the draft PR will be open.

tool_input.command: gh pr list --repo InnerScopeHearing/otchealth-claude-tools --limit 10 --state all --json number,title,mergedAt,createdAt,author 2>/dev/null | head -100

tool_input.description: Create feature branch for the daily summary PR
Create feature branch for the daily summary PR

tool_input.command: cat /home/runner/.claude/settings.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(json.dumps(d.get('permissions',{}), indent=2))" 2>/dev/null | head -40

tool_input.description: Create branch for daily summary draft PR
